title: Rename branding from 'EduNex Aisa' to 'EduNex AI' across the entire app

requirements.summary: Replace 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the frontend HTML page title
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab/title bar shows 'EduNex AI' instead of 'EduNex Aisa'.

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag from 'EduNex Aisa' to 'EduNex AI' to ensure the browser tab displays the correct brand name.

requirements.summary: Replace 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Navbar component
acceptanceCriteria: The navbar logo and all related text reads 'EduNex AI'.
No instance of 'EduNex Aisa' remains in the Navbar component.

file_operations.description: Replace all occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the logo text, aria-labels, and any other visible or hidden text within the Navbar component.

requirements.summary: Replace 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Footer component
acceptanceCriteria: The footer branding, copyright, and mission statement all read 'EduNex AI'.
No instance of 'EduNex Aisa' remains in the Footer component.

file_operations.description: Replace all occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the branding text, copyright line, mission statement, and any other visible text within the Footer component.

requirements.summary: Replace 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' across all remaining frontend source files
acceptanceCriteria: A full-text search for 'EduNex Aisa' in the frontend directory returns zero results.
All user-facing and configuration references display 'EduNex AI'.

file_operations.description: Replace any occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Home page component, including hero text, feature cards, and any other visible references.
Replace any occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the App component, including any comments or string literals that reference the old brand name.
Replace any occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the Tailwind configuration file comments or metadata.
Replace any occurrences of 'EduNex Aisa' with 'EduNex AI' in the global stylesheet comments or any text references.
